criteria.criterion: eval_solver.run_case dispatches plan-review-novelty cases to the novelty scorer path (score_novelty with a case-supplied prior-findings set), returning per-case scoreable output.

citation.description: Ticket comment records live run on 2026-07-15: run_eval('plan-review-novelty') PASSED — gate at_least(2), epochs 3, epoch_pass [true,true,true], 18/18 testcases, 0 failures, no ValueError. Named actor: Joe Oakhart; specific date and per-case verdicts enumerated.

criteria.criterion: The discriminates_novelty gold set runs end-to-end live: the eval completes with per-case verdicts (no ValueError), demonstrated by a recorded run.
A unit test pins the dispatch (a plan-review-novelty case routed offline via FakeRunner does not raise).
